project.project_title: Maya Chen, a female detective, chases a suspect through a ne
project.logline: When a covert exchange goes south in the heart of Neo-Kyoto, Detective Maya Chen must chase a slippery data broker through the city's arteries, uncovering a conspiracy that reaches the highest echelons of power.
project.world_setting: Neo-Kyoto, 2077. A sprawling megacity where ancient traditions clash with futuristic technology. Rain-slicked streets are bathed in neon light, casting long shadows that conceal hidden dangers. Corporations wield immense power, and cybernetic augmentation is commonplace. The air is thick with the smell of synthetic ramen and exhaust fumes. Crime is rampant, and the line between law enforcement and organized crime is blurred.
project.character_anchor: Maya Chen, East Asian female, short black bob haircut, sharp jawline, dark green trench coat, red scarf, silver ring on left hand

story_entities.name: Maya Chen
story_entities.description: Sharp jawline, high cheekbones, intense gaze, subtle scar above her left eyebrow.. Age: 35, Body: Athletic, lean.. Hair: Short, black bob, meticulously maintained, slightly asymmetrical.. Outfit: Dark green trench coat (weathered, but clean), red silk scarf, tailored black trousers, sturdy black leather boots. Always wears a silver ring on her left hand.. Props: Glock 19 (holstered), encrypted comm device (hidden in her coat), a small, worn photo of her deceased father (in her wallet)..

story_arc.opening: Maya is observing a shady data exchange between Kaito and a contact. The exchange goes wrong, and Kaito panics, grabbing the data chip and fleeing into the crowd.
story_arc.development: Maya pursues Kaito through the stairwell, navigating tight corners and obstacles. Kaito throws debris down the stairs to slow her down. | Kaito reaches the rooftop, hoping to escape across the neighboring buildings. Maya confronts him, but he's armed with a taser and manages to briefly stun her. | Maya recovers and gives chase, pursuing Kaito across the precarious bridge. He drops the data chip in the process, but Maya doesn't see it.
story_arc.climax: Kaito makes his escape, jumping onto a departing train. Maya is left on the platform, realizing she's been played.
story_arc.resolution: Maya Chen picks up the dropped data chip from the connecting bridge, noticing Akira Sato (well-dressed man from Character Bible) watching her from across the platform. The camera zooms into the data chip as she stares at Sato and a grim understanding washes over her face.
